mapper.select: SELECT * FROM act_re_procdef WHERE KEY_ = #{key} ORDER BY VERSION_ DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: update fnd_act_hi_comment set taskId = #{taskId}, instId = #{instId} where id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.* ,t2.`basicDataName` AS resultName , CONCAT(t3.`username`,'-' , t3.`realName`) AS assigneeName, t4.`quesnaireId` FROM fnd_act_hi_comment t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t2 ON t1.`result` = t2.`basicDataId` AND t2.`dataTypeCode` = 26 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t3 ON t1.`assignee` = t3.`username` LEFT JOIN pm_presales_project_callback t4 ON t1.`objId` = t4.`presalesId` AND t1.`taskId` = t4.`taskId` where objId = #{objId} and procdefKey = #{procdefKey} order by t1.assigneeTime asc
mapper.update: update $tableName$ set instId = #{instId}, applyState = 1,applyBy = #{applyBy},applyTime = now() where $objColumn$ = #{objId}
